name: 1-800Accountant
message: [AI generated] 1-800Accountant is a nationwide virtual accounting firm merging the convenience of technology with proactive professional services to provide small businesses with tax, accounting and advisory services. They serve start-ups, small and medium-sized businesses across various industries. The services include tax preparation and planning, bookkeeping, payroll, entity formation, tax planning and audit defense. Their mission is to make accounting and taxes easy and affordable for individuals and small businesses.
